# CTLineBreakMode.byTruncatingMiddle | Apple Developer Documentation

-  CTLineBreakMode.byTruncatingMiddle 

Case# CTLineBreakMode.byTruncatingMiddle

iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
case byTruncatingMiddle
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/ctlinebreakmode/bytruncatingmiddle#Discussion)

Each line is displayed so that the beginning and end fit in the container and the missing text is indicated by an ellipsis glyph in the middle.
